title: Fiery Mediterranean Casabe Grill
description: A nutty, dense, energizing Mediterranean dish featuring casabe, grilled with a robata grill and low-sodium-friendly flavors.
instructions: In a bowl, mash the cooked chickpeas until smooth, leaving some lumps for texture.

Stir in casabe flour, smoked paprika, red chili flakes, dried oregano, garlic powder, lemon zest, and lemon juice until a cohesive dough forms; add olive oil gradually to achieve a firm but pliable consistency.
Divide the dough into 2 equal portions and shape each into a 6-inch round patty, pressing the center slightly to create a shallow groove for toppings.
Preheat a charcoal brushless robata grill to medium-high heat and lightly oil the grates.
Place the patties on the grill, closing the lid, and cook for 5 minutes per side until golden and crisp, brushing the first 2 minutes of each side with a thin layer of olive oil.
While grilling, quickly sauté sliced zucchini and roasted red pepper in a dry pan over high heat for 2 minutes until just tender.
Flip the patties onto the cut side, spread the sautéed vegetables evenly across each patty, and sprinkle chopped parsley on top.
Return the patties to the grill for an additional 2 minutes to meld flavors, then remove and serve hot with a wedge of lemon on the side.
